label: Sootlamp Quarters
description: Sootlamp Quarters occupies a narrow cell of slagcrete and black basalt set deep within Ashenward City’s bonded hab-block wall, its seams gasketed against ash intrusion. Interior surfaces are sealed with vitrified coatings that catch the bruise-colored auroral glare as cold violet highlights across bare angles and recessed alcoves. A single shielded lumen-strip and a hardwired vox-jack sit behind a grit-filter grille, reflecting the city’s constant interference and relay-dependence. Storage niches and fold-down fittings keep the floor clear for decontamination, with an airlock threshold sized for ash-suit entry and rinse-down.
